summary: Read-only plan classification from the hydrated preflight artifact. #90866 remains the best live canonical for the Discord placeholder plus typing-heartbeat parity request. #84276, #87665, and #90017 are related but not safe duplicate closeouts because they preserve distinct root causes, provider scope, or reproduction details.

actions.reason: #90866 is open, hydrated, and has the broadest Discord-specific scope matching the cluster title and canonical hint.
Related Discord typing-indicator work, but not the same root cause or user-visible timing failure as the canonical Discord placeholder/heartbeat request.
Same Discord feedback and typing symptom family, but #87665 has a distinct subagent notification-policy root cause and should not be closed as a duplicate of #90866.
Related cross-provider precedent, but Slack and Discord have separate channel behavior and implementation scope.
